Class Engine

java.lang.Object
game.GameEntity
game.PowerUps.PowerUp
game.PowerUps.Engine
public class Engine extends PowerUp
Power-up that temporarily increases player movement speed.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Engine(Properties gameProps, double x, int wave, int index)
    Constructs an engine power-up.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    applyEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
    Applies a speed boost to the player ship.
    void
    removeEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
    Restores the player's normal movement speed.

    create, draw, getDuration, isActive, isOffScreen, markCollected, update

  • Constructor Details

    • Engine

      public Engine(Properties gameProps, double x, int wave, int index)
      Constructs an engine power-up.
      Parameters:
      gameProps - game properties file
      x - initial x-coordinate
      wave - wave number
      index - power-up index

  • Method Details

    • applyEffect

      public void applyEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
      Applies a speed boost to the player ship.
      Specified by:
      applyEffect in class PowerUp
      Parameters:
      playerShip - player ship receiving the effect

    • removeEffect

      public void removeEffect(PlayerShip playerShip)
      Restores the player's normal movement speed.
      Specified by:
      removeEffect in class PowerUp
      Parameters:
      playerShip - player ship losing the effect
